problem.title: GICP throughput and accuracy trade-off on the MCD NTU day-02 sequence
problem.question: Which GICP profile should stay as the current default on the MCD public dataset (NTU day-02)?

variants.label: Balanced local map
variants.intent: Keep the current repository default as the baseline trade-off.

variants.label: Fast recent map
variants.intent: Reduce scan density and map pressure to increase FPS.

variants.label: Dense recent map
variants.intent: Increase scan density, map budget, and correspondence richness.
